Real Estate Auctions

  1. Home
  2. Services
  3. Real Estate Auctions
Residential & Investment Properties

Sell Your Kansas Home at Auction

A real estate auction is a structured sale event where qualified buyers compete in real time for a property. Unlike a traditional listing that can sit on the market for months, an auction sets a specific date and brings motivated buyers to the table at the same time.

Alex runs auctions for residential properties, rural homes, homes on acreage, and properties in transition — estates, divorces, relocations, and similar situations where a defined timeline matters. Every auction is marketed to reach motivated, qualified buyers.

Properties We Auction

  • Single-family homes
  • Estate sales and trust properties
  • Investment & rental properties
  • Distressed and as-is properties
  • Vacant homes and lots

The Auction Advantage for Sellers

  • Set auction date — no indefinite market exposure
  • Sold as-is, eliminating inspection & repair contingencies
  • Competitive bidding maximizes final sale price
  • No prolonged negotiation — buyers come prepared
  • Qualified, motivated bidders only

How It Works

1
Property Evaluation & Consultation

Alex evaluates the property and discusses whether auction is the right fit for your situation and goals.

2
Marketing & Promotion

Targeted marketing campaigns run in the weeks leading up to auction day to generate qualified buyer interest.

3
Auction Day

A professionally run, transparent auction event. Registered bidders compete for the property in real time.

4
Closing

The high bidder executes the purchase agreement and closing proceeds on the agreed timeline. Brokered by L2 Realty Inc.

Thinking About Selling?

Get a free, no-obligation consultation with Alex. Find out if auction is the right fit for your property and situation.

Request a Consultation

Alex Miller Real Estate Auctions

Alex Miller is a licensed real estate auctioneer serving central Kansas. Every auction is handled with transparency, professionalism, and a commitment to getting sellers the best possible outcome.
